SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID ,ExceptionOptionText exceptionOptionText ,hash(concat(IfNull(CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID,"") ,"|",IfNull(ExceptionOptionText,""))) AS hashKey FROM CDIAlertWorkflowExceptionOption
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID,"")=IfNull(t.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey THEN UPDATE SET  cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID = s.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID ,exceptionOptionText = s.exceptionOptionText ,updatedDatetime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,hashKey = s.hashKey WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID ,exceptionOptionText ,createdDatetime ,updatedDatetime ,hashKey) VALUES (s.cdiAlertWorkflowExceptionOptionID ,s.exceptionOptionText ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,s.hashKey)
